structure.table_role: Runtime audit header for a calculated chart or prediction scan.

checks.name: running_requires_heartbeat
checks.expression: status <> 'running' OR heartbeat_at IS NOT NULL

checks.name: finished_at_required_when_terminal
checks.expression: status NOT IN ('completed','failed') OR finished_at IS NOT NULL

checks.name: error_only_when_failed
checks.expression: status = 'failed' OR (error_code IS NULL AND error_message IS NULL)

checks.name: failed_requires_error_code
checks.expression: status <> 'failed' OR error_code IS NOT NULL

checks.name: started_before_finished
checks.expression: started_at IS NULL OR finished_at IS NULL OR started_at <= finished_at

checks.name: heartbeat_not_before_started
checks.expression: started_at IS NULL OR heartbeat_at IS NULL OR started_at <= heartbeat_at

checks.name: heartbeat_not_after_finished
checks.expression: finished_at IS NULL OR heartbeat_at IS NULL OR heartbeat_at <= finished_at
